author: Haroen Viaene
subject: docs(storybook): events logs --> event logs (algolia/react-instantsearch#249)
body:
* docs(storybook): events logs --> event logs

This seems more natural to me.

Google results for 

1. events logs: About 58,900,000 results  (but all top ones mentioning `event logs` in the title) 
2. event logs: About 11,800,000 results

* !fixup
